mapper.sql: id, user_id, login_account, id_card, address, branch_code, name, avatar_color, position, department, source, birthday, mobile, intern_date, hire_date, contract_status, salary_base, deposit_amount, status, resign_date, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_employee ( user_id, login_account, id_card, address, branch_code, name, avatar_color, position, department, source, birthday, mobile, intern_date, hire_date, contract_status, salary_base, deposit_amount, status, resign_date, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginAccount}, #{idCard}, #{address}, #{branchCode}, #{name}, #{avatarColor}, #{position}, #{department}, #{source}, #{birthday}, #{mobile}, #{internDate}, #{hireDate}, #{contractStatus}, #{salaryBase}, #{depositAmount}, #{status}, #{resignDate}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
